landing.heroTitle: The Stars Knew Everything About You.
landing.heroSocialProof: {count} people already discovered their chart today
landing.heroSubtitle: Your personal natal chart and AI astrologer who knows your chart and remembers every conversation
landing.featureChartSubtitle: Discover who you were born to be
landing.featureChartDesc: We build an accurate natal chart from your date, time and place of birth. Every planet, every house — with a full interpretation in your language.
landing.featureAiDesc: Ask anything — about love, career, finances. The astrologer knows your chart and remembers every conversation, like a real personal consultant.
landing.featureCalSubtitle: Live in the rhythm of the stars
landing.featureCalDesc: A personal calendar with astro events for the year ahead, synced with Google Calendar. Know the best days for decisions, meetings and rest.
landing.featureCalB1: Planet transits mapped to your chart
landing.pricingTitle: Choose your path to the stars
landing.pricingSubtitle: 3 days free on all paid plans
landing.footerTagline: Your AI astrologer with personal memory

auth.registerSubtitle: Create an account to save your chart
auth.checkEmailHint: Once confirmed, come back and sign in
auth.errorWeakPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.errorGeneric: Something went wrong, please try again

chat.suggestCompatibilityPrompt: Tell me about my compatibility with other zodiac signs based on my natal chart
chat.suggestLovePrompt: What does my natal chart say about my love life and relationships?
chat.suggestCareerPrompt: Tell me about my career potential and best fields based on my natal chart
chat.suggestFinancePrompt: What does my natal chart reveal about finances and material prosperity?
chat.suggestTodayPrompt: Tell me about today's astrological influences in relation to my natal chart
chat.emptySubtitle: Ask anything about your horoscope, compatibility, or destiny
chat.errorGeneric: Something went wrong, please try again
chat.inputHint: AI can make mistakes — verify important information
chat.explainPrompt: Please give me a detailed and personalized reading of my natal chart. Tell me about each planet in its sign and house — what it means for my personality, talents, relationships, and life path. Pay special attention to the Sun, Moon, Ascendant, and Mercury. Write warmly and vividly, like a true astrologer.
chat.horoscopePrompt: Tell me more about my horoscope for today — what should I keep in mind, what to expect, and how to best use today's energy?

chart.explainChartSubtitle: AI will give a detailed reading of each planet
chart.askAstrologerSubtitle: Ask any question about your destiny
chart.noChartSubtitle: Go to the home page and fill in your birth details
chart.onboardSubtitle: We will map every planet to the exact moment of your birth
chart.cityError: City not found — try a different spelling

calendar.title: Astro Calendar
calendar.selectDay: Select a day to see events
calendar.noEvents: A quiet day — good for rest and reflection
calendar.new_moon_desc: New beginnings. Best time to set intentions and start new projects.
calendar.first_quarter_desc: Time to take action on what was started at the new moon.
calendar.full_moon_desc: Culmination and release. Emotions run high — a powerful time for decisions.
calendar.last_quarter_desc: Reflection and letting go. Clear out what no longer serves you.
calendar.solar_eclipse_desc: A powerful solar eclipse — rare and transformative. Major new cycles begin.
calendar.lunar_eclipse_desc: Lunar eclipse — intense emotional release and revelation. Things come to light.
calendar.retrograde_start_desc: {planet} appears to move backward. Review, revise, reflect — avoid launching new things.
calendar.retrograde_end_desc: {planet} turns direct again. Projects and communications flow forward.
calendar.ingress_desc: {planet} moves into {sign}, shifting its energy for weeks or months ahead.
calendar.moon_sign_desc: The Moon in {sign} colors emotions and intuition for the next 2–3 days.

horoscope.title: Today's Horoscope
horoscope.noChart: Build your natal chart to get a personalized horoscope

reviews.r1: Finally understood why I couldn't find fulfilling work — it was all in my natal chart. The AI explained in 5 minutes what I'd been searching for for years. Now I know which direction to go!
reviews.r2: It predicted a fight with my boyfriend 3 days in advance — Mercury was square my Mars. Now I track transits daily and conflicts have become so much rarer.
reviews.r3: I added my mom's chart and learned why our relationship is so complex. Everything matched perfectly. For the first time I found a way to understand her instead of just getting angry.
reviews.r4: The paid subscription is the best investment I made this year. The daily horoscope arrives in Telegram every morning and is always surprisingly accurate. My husband wants a chart now too 😄
reviews.r5: I found the perfect day for a negotiation in the astro calendar — Jupiter trine my Mercury. I went to the meeting that exact day and got promoted. Coincidence? I don't think so.
reviews.r6: I used to think astrology was made up. Came out of curiosity, now I don't make important decisions without the AI astrologer. It's just a different level of self-knowledge.
